paper_metadata.subject_name: Artificial Neural Networks and Deep Learning

subparts.text: Explain the applications of soft computing in detail.
Draw the schematic diagram of a biological neuron. Explain the terms: synapse and refractory period.
What is an activation function? Explain with examples.
What is dropout? Why is it needed?
What are the different rules for designing a CNN?
How are NLP models used for sentiment analysis?
Discuss the ethical considerations and challenges of using AI in healthcare.

questions.question_text: Explain the features of hard computing and soft computing. How do you select a suitable scheme of computing to solve a particular problem?
Explain the role of uncertainty in real-world decision-making problems. Provide examples where uncertainty significantly affects outcomes.
What are the practical issues in neural network training?
Explain the architecture and learning factors of a back-propagation network.
Explain the different types of CNN. Also mention the applications.
Explain the role of saliency maps in visualizing convolutional neural networks. How do they help in understanding model predictions?
Explain how deep learning has transformed problem-solving approaches in real-world domains. Support your answer with any two relevant case studies.
Discuss how recurrent neural networks are applied for stock market prediction. Include a case study with performance evaluation.
